name: Sweet & Sour Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the shiitake mushrooms and set aside.
2. Press the tofu for 30 minutes and cube it.
3. Quarter the cucumbers lengthwise and cut into 1 1/2-inch lengths.
4. Chop the green bell pepper.
5. Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
6. Add the tofu and carefully stir-fry until the color changes.
7. Remove the tofu and add the garlic. Stir-fry until the color changes.
8. Add all the vegetables to the wok and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
9. Add all the seasonings and continue to stir-fry for 3 to 5 minutes.
10. Serve garnished with green onions.
